title: Collective Memory
description: Detects when shared memory is preserved across generations, institutions, and systems, resisting propaganda and enforced amnesia.
indicators: Suppressed histories remain accessible through counter-archives
Continuity of cultural memory across attempts at erasure
Memory distributed among many, not controlled by few
